hero.desc: We are builders — creating digital platforms, SaaS products, and intelligent tools that reshape industries across the UAE and India.

services.title: Brand Creation
services.desc: We conceptualize, design, and launch brands from scratch — crafting market-ready identities with purpose and precision.

services.title: Digital Platforms
services.desc: End-to-end development of web platforms and marketplaces — from listing engines to full booking and payment integrations.

services.title: SaaS Solutions
services.desc: Purpose-built SaaS applications designed for specific industries — from garage management to field sales intelligence.

services.title: AI-Powered Tools
services.desc: Leveraging AI to create smart prompt packages, automation tools, and knowledge-transfer systems for modern professionals.

about.story: Veltrix International FZE is a UAE-licensed Free Zone Entity founded by two entrepreneurs with a shared vision: to create impactful digital brands and products that serve real markets.\n\nWith operations spanning the UAE and India — through our India entity Syfte Market Services — we build ventures from the ground up, from ideation and product design through to launch and scale.

products.name: VenueBook.in
products.desc: India's dedicated event venue booking platform — listing, discovering, and reserving venues for weddings, corporate events, parties, and more. Also expanding to UAE for farmstays and unique venue experiences.
products.tags: Event Tech, Booking Platform, India & UAE

products.name: ExMechanic
products.desc: A comprehensive garage customer flow and management application built specifically for automotive workshops — streamlining job cards, customer communication, billing, and operational intelligence.

products.name: FieldPro
products.desc: A field sales intelligence tool that empowers on-ground sales teams with real-time tracking, territory management, knowledge gathering, and smart reporting dashboards.

products.name: Veltrix Prompts
products.desc: A curated library of professional-grade AI prompt packages for professionals, students, and learners — unlock the full potential of AI with structured, tested, domain-specific prompt systems.

contact.desc: Interested in partnering, investing, or just want to learn more? We'd love to hear from you.
